programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself the unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A conman and his wife con the drovers into pooling their efforts to prepare a Christmas celebration for a sickly Mexican boy. The boy isn't really sick and Rowdy ignores Favor's orders to move the herd across a river, trapping the herd.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Duane Eddy as a cowboy who arrives in town during Christmas with his pregnant wife---and no lodgings.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet: bring in Santa Claus.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Three Smart Saps, Gents Without Cents, Idiots Deluxe, Crime On Their Hands, Scheming Schemers, Saved By The Belle
programme.desc: "The Stooges are engaged to the three daughters of a prison warden. When they learn that some crooks have taken over the prison and their prospective father-in-law has been locked up, they decide to go undercover to rescue him. The Stooges sneak into the prison where they find a casino with a fancy party in progress. After swiping some formal attire, they crash the party and get candid camera evidence to expose the crooked goings-on. With the crooks behind bars once again, the Stooges are able to get married and all ends well. , The Stooges are three small time actors looking for a job. They meet three girl dancers in the situation and get a small part in a big producers show at the shipyard. When the rest of the cast doesn't show up, the Stooges and the girls must put on the whole show themselves. The show is a hit and the Stooges marry the girls and head to Niagara Falls for their honeymoon. , The Stooges are arrested for treason. , Moe is on trial for assaulting Curly and Larry with an ax. Moe relates how Curly and Larry took him on a hunting trip for his nerves. Out in the woods they confronted a bear, which Curly and Larry stunned, and thinking it was dead, threw it in the back of their car, where it came awake, tossed Moe out and drove the car into a tree. The judge finds Moe not guilty and Moe promptly goes after Larry and Curly again with the ax. , The Stooges are janitors working in a newspaper office. When an anonymous caller phones in a tip about the theft a famous diamond, the boys decide to become reporters and go after the crooks. They find the crooks, but Shemp accidentally swallows the diamond, which was hidden in a bowl of candy. The crooks want to cut the diamond out, but the boys foil them with the help of a friendly gorilla. , The Stooges are three incompetent plumbers who foul up the plumbing in a fancy mansion where a society party is going on. They manage to catch a couple of thieves masquerading as guests before the whole party degenerates into a pie fight. [A remake of "Vagabond Loafers", with footage from "A Plumbing we will go" and "Half-Wits Holiday". Joe Palma (face hidden) stands in for Shemp. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "An evil hyponotist/ventriloquist plots to gain an heiress' millions."

programme.title: House of Svengoolie
programme.desc: "The entire Brady family manages to overcome personal obstacles to spend a happy holiday together."

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: "Nobody believes Will Robinson when he sends himself back to Earth with an alien transporter, since the world believes they all had died once they realized their ship had gone off course. Lost in Space's only Christmas program."

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: Admiral Nelson must get a 12-year-old prince back to his country to assume the throne before the reds take over.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: Fitzhuge pretends to be a magical holiday elf to entertain two orphan children. But the ruse turns deadly when he discovers that the giants ritually throw Thrombeldinbar into a fire to celebrate the holiday.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: Tony and Doug set out to checkmate the crafty Machiavelli, who is making a game of the Civil War battle at Gettysburg.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A police shooting causes Vincent to investigate a possible alien encounter with hidden secrets.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Robbie Cartman's deer Ginger,rescued sometime ago,should be sent back into the wild. Robbie loves his "pet" but Adams assures him it's right. Checking on her later,Rob can't find her anywhere. Can he,Adams and friends solve this mystery?"

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "The life story of the Adelie penguin, the principal inhabitant of this barren continent at the end of the earth."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin goes unarmed deep into the jungles of India to film the adventures of a full-grown Bengal tigress and her two young cubs."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Travel with Marlin and his band of adventurers as they explore the Golf of California, the last great unexplored marine paradise in the Western hemisphere, lying between the Mexican main land and Baja, California."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "There’s a legend that during the 16th century, Spanish ponies from a sinking galleon swam ashore to the island of Assateague, Virginia. Today, once a year, men from neighboring Chincoteague Island gather for one of the most unusual roundups."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin travels to Gir Forest in India in search of the king of beasts…the lion."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim visit the mountain prairies of Wyoming where falcons, eagles and hawks rule the air."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol is asked to sing at church on Christmas, but loses her voice just days before the event. A hopeful Cindy asks a department store Santa Claus to bring Carol's voice back in time.

programme.title: Full House
programme.desc: Michelle and Jesse are almost arrested on Christmas Eve when a Scrooge-like merchant (MICKEY ROONEY) refuses to exchange a gift that Michelle bought for her dad.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie tells Al the story of the time an unexpected visitor turned Howard Cunningham's plans for a traditional family Christmas upside down.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne accidentally loses one of her mother's diamond earrings.

programme.title: Holiday Special
programme.desc: "The special presents an origin story for Santa Claus, who is depicted as a man named Nicholas Claus who wishes to give every child in the world a gift for Christmas. The elves of the North Pole become obligated to grant his wish, facing great obstacles. "

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After losing his lunch money three days in a row, Ward gives Beaver one last chance by letting him handle his haircut money. However, when he loses that too, Beaver decides to give himself a haircut just days before he's scheduled to be an angel in a play.

programme.title: The Adventures of Ozzie and Harriet
programme.desc: "Ozzie recalls a story from his childhood of when he wished for a white Christmas."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to head home for Christmas, and once Drysdale and Jane hear about this, they make all the arrangements, getting Granny and Elly mink coats and giving the Clampetts their first plane ride in style. After a slight mix-up, the Clampetts finally get home, surprising Pearl and Jethrine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts arrive back at their old cabin to spend the Christmas holiday with Pearl. But since the cabin will be too crowded with the Clampetts and Brewster, Pearl suggests Brewster stays with her, in an attempt to get engaged. She tries to woo Brewster by showing herself off at the theatre she works at during the premiere of 'Ben Hur.'

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.sub-title: Birds Gotta Fly, Fish Gotta Talk
programme.desc: During Christmas, the castaways get homesick and recall the day they were shipwrecked.

programme.title: The Lucy Show
programme.desc: Lucy again tries to impress her athletic boyfriend by bragging about her mastery of various winter sports. When he invites her on a ski trip, she takes a crash-course in skiing from Mr. Mooney.

programme.title: Holiday Special
programme.sub-title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Cruise
programme.desc: "A woman tries to lure a wealthy man into a "stacked" card game with her mother, but complications arise when he falls for her. Meanwhile, Julie has hired has-been comedian to play Santa Claus during the voyage. At the same time, a woman debates whether to take her ex-husband back when she discovers he may have a secret."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A modern-day Scrooge (businessman Ben Weaver) causes trouble on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Vintage memorabilia collector David Schafer has spent decades assembling the toys, comic books, and other collectibles from his childhood, all in strikingly pristine condition. David shares some of his rarest and most valuable items, including a Batman and Justice League playset released at the height of the Caped Crusader’s 1966 popularity; a Mad Magazine straitjacket that was available by mail only; and the 1941 comic that features the first appearance of Wonder Woman. Joining Lisa is “Collector’s Call” favorite Joel Magee, a.k.a. America’s Toy Scout. Joel appraises the entirety of David’s dazzling collection, then makes a trade offer for one of David’s Disney rarities. The show concludes with David unveiling to Lisa a 1982 Mad Magazine parody of "The Facts of Life.""

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye writes home, describing Christmas in Korea: Radar ships a jeep home, a piece at a time; Henry gives the monthly lecture on sex, with the aid of figure A and figure B; Trapper helps deliver a calf; Klinger and Frank get into a fight, but Father Mulcahy smoothes things over; Hawkeye and Trapper sabotage Margaret's tent; Hawkeye flies to the front line dressed as Santa to help a wounded soldier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Father Mulcahy writes a pre-Christmas letter to his sister, who is a nun. He recounts his frustrations at not being more effective at the 4077th.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: It's Christmas Day and Archie is the only one not in the Christmas spirit. Mike and Gloria question him, but he refuses to reveal what's bugging him. The Jeffersons come over to wish the Bunkers a "Merry Christmas", but this does anything but cheer Archie up especially since Henry is dressed as Santa.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Christmas season has everyone in the Christmas spirit. For a joke, Archie purchases some fake nose and mustache glasses that were on sale, but Mike also happened to go to that same store and hit that same sale. Meanwhile, Edith returns from a doctor checkup and confides in Gloria the fact that she has a lump in her breast and she fears it may be breast cancer.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The clash of two worlds explodes in this episode. Mike's friend is a Draft Dodger and it is Christmas dinner and unbeknownst to Archie this guy is sitting at his Christmas dinner table. The guy is exactly everything Archie hates about Mike's generation. On top of this Archie's friend is also spending Christmas dinner with the Bunkers and he lost his son to the war.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred is a Scrooge-like miser during the Christmas season and his friends try to get him to join into the Christmas spirit, but he rejects the attempts. After being accused of a being a Scrooge, Fred falls asleep and dreams up "A Christmas Carol." Now it i

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is overjoyed by the reaction he is getting from gifting a toaster to his family and friends.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray believes he has found the ultimate Christmas gift for his parents.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: "The Alan Brady Show" performs their Christmas variety show.

programme.title: The Mary Tyler Moore Show
programme.sub-title: Christmas And The Hardluck Kid Ii
programme.desc: "Single Mary agrees to work on Christmas so others can be with their family."

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: "Ralph sleeps at the Nortons' to avoid his visiting mother-in-law. "

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A French maid runs away with and marries a professional burglar with hopes of making him honest.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Berlinger, a millionaire manufacturer and stolen gem dealer, will be transferring diamonds to a Syndicate boss for $75 million. Only one man knows where the diamonds are: Hoffman, Berlinger's former lieutenant, who stole them.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: "While being pursued by the police, Dr. Kimble finds himself on the same bus as Marie Gerald, Lieutenant Gerald's wife."

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "The seal of the confessional must be preserved as Harry O goes after a deranged killer who confessed his crimes to a priest."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A female con-artist uses an evangelistic approach to lure buyers into her pyramid scheme. The Bunco division can't charge her with false advertising, so they prosecute her for operating a lottery.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a scam involving a phony LAPD newsletter, which comes with a card for subscribers entitling the bearer to preferential treatment from the police.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy returns from vacation sporting a mustache, but finds it difficult getting his colleagues to accept his new look. On patrol, he and Reed respond to a small plane crash by a drunkard that critically injures his young son, investigate the theft of valuable stamps from a mansion, search for a jewelry store armed robber with the aid of a talented witness, deal with a very unlucky purse snatcher and interrogate an evasive department store shoplifter with a big surprise in her purse.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While assisting in a tactics training course, Malloy and Reed meet Officer Wells' new partner, an overconfident probationary officer who seems destined to put himself and his colleagues in danger. On patrol, they deal with an unconventional bank robber, come to the aid of a motor officer who is injured during a traffic stop and investigate a credible bomb threat at a grocery store.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally gets an invitation to attend a cotillion with Mary Ellen Rogers. At first he wants to turn down the invitation, but then decides to go anyway, despite the fact that Mary Ellen has signed them up to do the cha-cha in a dance contest.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally begins combing his hair a new way, which was inspired by a fad started by Eddie that has swept his school. However, June and Ward are aghast by his hairdo and June becomes determined to get Wally to change his haircomb back to his normal style.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Mischievous Doll
programme.desc: When a shady private investigator and his pawn die mysteriously, the woman who may have been his intended target is charged with their murders.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Called to jury duty, Matlock butts heads with the other jurors, who think the defendant is guilty of murder. Matlock implores them to reexamine the evidence before sentencing the man to death.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A man murders his business partner and frames the man's illegitimate daughter for the crime in an attempt to gain the man's business and his wife.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Ben returns home. He plans on leaving the Waltons' mill and becoming an engineer

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Chester doubts a man's deathbed murder confession, so he sets out to find the real killer.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights are in Virginia City to celebrate the birthday of Jimmy Chang. The fun quickly vanishes when Jimmy is accused of murder and the Cartwrights have to battle a racist lawyer to prove their friend's innocence.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for escape after he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Hawks rides to the John Kaylor ranch to buy horses for the train but John just died. His widow Naomi refuses to sell the horses at the price John had promised. Naomi shows no sorrow over her husband's death, only wanting to sell the ranch."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John are accused of stealing money from a victim. A premature delivery and a blinded man result from a car crash. A perilous rescue involves a plane that might explode.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Charles plans a scheme to get rich when he discovers that blue scrip is going to be exchanged for red. Hawkeye and B.J. outsmart him, and he is left holding the worthless scrip. Klinger tries to get into West Point so that he can get out of Korea.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar notices a number of tattoos on one of the wounded, and convinces himself that with a tattoo he will be irresistible to women. Everyone tries to discourage him, and he admits to having received a tattoo that will wash off. Meanwhile, Margaret is frustrated with a new nurse who keeps getting upset at the sight of combat injuries.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Potter, deciding that the camp is out of shape, enforces a calisthenics course. When nobody is enjoying it, he makes it fun by splitting the camp into two teams. These teams compete for three day R&R passes. Klinger tries to get out of the army by getting fat.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Victor Bloodworth predicts that 280 wounded will arrive at the 4077th. Hawkeye is antagonized by Bloodworth and shoves him against a wall. Bloodworth presses for a court martial until he becomes one of the wounded and watches Hawkeye saving a soldier's life. Realizing Hawkeye is value as a doctor, Bloodworth drops all charges.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie is afraid that Andy's new girlfriend, Peggy, will take his place in his father's heart, and sets out to sabotage their relationship.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Floyd run out of gas while coming home from a fishing trip. While looking for a telephone they are captured by three female escaped convicts.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra points out how alike Ray and his annoying cousin are.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is bewildered when Debra starts initiating sex more.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets the Germans to look for an allied agent by planting an opened parachute in camp. This gives him the opportunity to get at the briefcase that was handcuffed to a courier.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to open an antiques business selling "rare" cuckoo clocks, a business venture that is actually a ruse enabling the POWs to smuggle information out in the timepieces.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests Ken Berry And Eydie Gorme
programme.desc: In Carol and Sis, Carol and Vicki disturb Harvey while he attempts to finish his taxes. Then, in Salute to RKO Studio, the gang parodies classic films, including "The Pride of the Yankees", "Notorious", "The Outlaw", and "Quasimodo".

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fanciful Frail
programme.desc: Things keep going from awful to good grief for poor Ethel Andrews. First she's left at the altar by her fiancee, Bruce Strickland, who also lets her take the blame for a $50,000 securities theft.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: I Shot An Arrow Into The Air
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash-land on what they believe to be an asteroid and have limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Bill and Janet Nelson are besieged by the understanding that a troubled neighborhood boy is planning to slay them.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix's client hires him to find the man who saved his son's life. The search takes him to an island near South America, and then the next link in the chain turns up dead.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: An ex-con is threatened when his safe cracking skills are needed for a theft of 1 million dollars.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: When a plastic surgeon accidentally kills his patient, he remodels his nurse to look exactly like her.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An officer accused of taking a bribe has chosen Sgt. Friday to represent him at his trial board hearing. Witnesses saw the officer accept the money, but he insists it was for the payback of a loan made years ago.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Drugs are found aboard a plane that has crashed in the San Fernando Valley. The pilot is quickly traced, but in order to force him to name his connection, Friday and Gannon ask the press to sit on the story for a few hours.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: The captain has ordered top priority be given to ending a rash of burglaries in the area, and all signs point to career criminal Reno West. Meanwhile, Malloy and Reed use their creativity to neutralize a vicious guard dog at the home of an unresponsive diabetic man, investigate the theft of a jade figurine from a mansion and respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: There's a new dispatcher on today's day watch, and while Reed can't stand her voice, Malloy sees the situation much differently. On patrol, they search for a hit and run driver who left a small girl in serious condition, investigate a break-in at a synagogue, deal with a drunk woman who is searching for her daughter and become part of a SWAT team attempting to neutralize a sniper terrorizing the movie studio from which he was just fired.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill buys a house in the burbs, and has a shocking new neighbor, Simon Shock!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and Larry have been put in charge of the class cookie fund and are taking turns guarding the money. A new kid takes advantage of them and cons Beaver and Larry out of three dollars from the fund.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: An old friend of Beaver's, David Manning, invites him to a birthday party and Beaver promises to attend, but as the week passes Beaver forgets all about it. When the day arrives, June, Ward and Wally scramble to find the Beaver, who is spending the day with Larry, wandering around town.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Crying Cherub
programme.desc: A valuable Matisse painting is stolen from a museum. When the thief is found murdered, museum employee June Sinclair and her boyfriend, David Lambert, are charged with the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a baseball umpire is murdered, Matlock has a whole team of suspects. It seems that everyone had a beef with the ump.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The lyrics to a blues song recall a murder that happened 50 years earlier. The victim - Sweet's grandfather. And the only people left with the answers are the bluesman who wrote the song and a retired sheriff.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jonesy arrives in town and meets Mary Ellen.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A rival saloon owner forces Kitty into a deadly competition.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When the Cartwrights find out that some of the Ponderosa may be forfeited under the Spanish Land Grant, they decide to take legal action in order to stop it. Adam, however, takes another plan of action, which involves getting to know the beautiful heiress who is claiming the land under the grant.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Micah has an infamous outlaw, Charlie Gordo, in his jail waiting for the U.S. marshal from Denver to take Gordo to the Yuma prison for hanging. With the arrival of the stage, Micah finds that the lawman has been killed, and he has to look to his friends to defend the jail from Gordo's gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas' old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Bitter alcoholic Stevenson Drake develops a dislike for the even tempered John Hollister, a fellow Southerner, when he learns he didn't fight for the Confederacy. He also is bothered by the friendliness between his wife and Hollister."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John is audited by the IRS. A man hit on the head wants to be treated by a doctor, not the paramedics. A child is rescued from a locked car. A pregnant girl has difficulty breathing. A professional medical con man shows up at Rampart. A construction worker is trapped when part of the building his crew is working on collapses, and he wants Roy to remove his leg before the rest of the building falls.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Lost behind enemy lines, Hawkeye and Margaret form a personal truce and seek shelter in a roadside hut."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Margaret and Hawkeye seek solace from enemy fire in each other's arms and end up, briefly, as lovers. "

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After Charles hands B.J. $200, he begins to take advantage. Everyone gets together and persuades Charles to play poker. He has incredible beginner's luck until Radar discovers that Charles whistles loudly when he bluffs. They all win back their money and then some.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th has just ended a rough three-day ordeal with wounded soldiers. Charles plays a French horn and drives Hawkeye and B.J. crazy. They refuse to bathe until the French horn playing is stopped; the two are even forced to eat outside because of their unhygienic presences.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bea longs for a special present: a blue bed jacket.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tries to convince everyone of a lack of security at Mayberry Bank, and is furious that no one listens to him. Taking matters into his own hands, he ends up stuck in the bank vault.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is shocked to discover that he was left back in school.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra raises the notion that Robert may be gay.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Is There A Traitor In The House?
programme.desc: Hogan plans to send information to London by using a German radio propaganda program.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Two German officers interfere with Hogan's operations when one tries to turn Stalag 13 into an officer's retirement home the other wants to use the facilities to interrogate the citizens of the local town.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests David Hartman And Paula Kelly
programme.desc: In Nora Desmond, Carol plays a washed-up, silent film actress who goes to dinner for the first time in years. Then, in George and Zelda, Carol questions a doctor's methods to treat her sick husband. Finally, in This Is Your Lifetime, a parody of "This Is Your Life", Carol is embarrassed when she's caught on camera at the gym after gaining weight.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Unwelcome Well
programme.desc: Powerful and avaricious businessman Jerome Klee has made a fortune in oil and intends to make a lot more. But after crossing a business associate and his wife, he turns up dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas, a man falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: John Pemberton comes up with an everlasting answer for dealing with his cruel, intrusive wife.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Still searching for the man who saved his client's son's life, Mannix stumbles into the ugly side of politics: an assassination plot.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The parents of a teen girl hire Cannon when they discover a charismatic young man is trying to lure their daughter into a cult.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A fortune hunter marries rich women and makes off with their valuables.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When two small girls go missing, the mother is convinced that their estranged father kidnapped them. However, a preliminary investigation by Friday and Gannon determines that the man has no knowledge of his daughters' whereabouts.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are convinced that "Brother" William Bentley's Temple of the Expanded Mind is just a sham—a front for Bentley to sell LSD to the students of a nearby elementary school.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed has full faith that an Explorer Scout volunteering at the station can repair his television set in time to watch 'King Kong,' but Malloy thinks he's crazy for letting a teenager work on expensive electronics. On today's patrol, they engage in a high-speed chase with a teenager on a modified dirt bike, investigate a report of a woman who may have buried her husband in their backyard, search for a female bank robber, deal with a group of women illegally protesting outside a supermarket and respond to a call of a robbery in progress at a coffee shop.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While Reed is having his shoes fixed at the repair shop, the squeakiness of his replacement shoes is driving Malloy crazy. On patrol, they deal with a deranged homeowner destroying his own possessions, stop a cargo van whose driver misunderstands the meaning of double jeopardy, search for a young boy hiding in an industrial building about to be demolished and create a hostage situation after shooting a bank robber.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Do you need advice? Bill,Toony, and a special guest comedian are here to help."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After getting a poor grade in gym class on his report card, Beaver becomes determined to prove to everyone that he is a good athlete, so he signs up to play baseball—where it's the boys versus the girls.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Larry invites Beaver to the carnival and tells him that his mother will treat him. However, when Mrs. Mondello refuses to give Larry money, Larry decides to find some. So Larry throws some of his mother's money out the window and when Beaver comes over, Larry pretends as if he's found it.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Nimble Nephew
programme.desc: Mason is sought out by land tycoon Adam Thompson, who suspects one of his nephews of rifling the house safe. The twist? The land tycoon's next in command is found dead, after it's found out that he was the one stealing the secrets.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock agrees to defend a man who has been accused of murdering the relationship columnist whose response ended his relationship.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A deputy provides protection for a cotton grower who is running a pot growing operation. But the deputy makes a big mistake when he wounds Bubba's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Mary Ellen travels to Florida.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An ex-farmer decides to become a fight promoter to make his fortune.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A sheepherder and his men try to drive their sheep across the Ponderosa. Ben and Adam disagree about how to stop them. Ben wants the Cartwrights to handle their own matters, but Adam wants to call in the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle—and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The pangs of first love are painful for Mark: the object of his affections has eyes for another.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "While riding through the desert plains, Duke and Charlie come across a sheriff as he is about to die of a heart attack and his female prisoner, Lily Legend, a childhood sweetheart of Duke who the sheriff is taking to be hanged for murder."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: When Johnny's policeman friend is injured in a car crash, the paramedics can't reach the hospital because another squad is using the biophone. A child with a mysterious malady turns out to be drunk. Roy and John assist at the hospital when the victims of a motorcycle gang war are brought in for treatment. An artist becomes trapped in his own sculpture. A father and son are trapped in a collapse at a construction site.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: In need of a special surgical clamp, Hawkeye and B.J. hire Mr. Shin, a local jewelry dealer, to make it. Days later the clamp is used to save the leg of a wounded soldier. Mr. Shin goes into the surgical supply business.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With British and American casualties heavy, the 4077th's supply of penicillin has been stolen. Father Mulcahy discovers, from Corporal Bryant, the location of some penicillin, and he and Klinger go out in search of it. They are shot at, but safely return with the drug and save the day.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With the arrival of a shipment of records, Radar plays the part of a disc jockey and helps to get everyone through the incredibly long deluge of wounded.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hot Lips, believing herself to be pregnant, asks Hawkeye to test her. The only rabbit available to use for the test is Radar's pet, Fluffy. Meanwhile, Martinson, a patient, holds Charles at gunpoint, demanding he be sent back to Ohio.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie must learn to defend himself against a bully.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is goaded into ticketing the governor's car and mistakenly believes Andy is setting him up for a dressing-down by the governor.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra learn that Ally has been bullying another child.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Everyone gets on Ray's case because he's doesn't go to Mass.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: The Rise And Fall Of Sergeant Schultz
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied in the rescue of a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt. Schultz.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Klink to get back in shape so he won't be sent to the Russian front.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests William Conrad And Isabel Sanford
programme.desc: In Carol and Sis, Harvey mistakenly steals another man's wallet. Then, in TV Blackouts, the gang salutes TV shows, including "Sonny and Cher, "Jack LaLanne", "Password", "The Golddiggers", and "Maude".

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Dead Ringer
programme.desc: While Mason is representing Barbara Kramer, who accuses Otis Swanson of stealing her father's intellectual property, Swanson hatches a nefarious scheme to discredit Mason and distract him from the case. Mason loses the case; however, Swanson soon turns up dead and Mason now defends Kramer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud—and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: I'll Be The Judge, I'll Be The Jury (s1, ep)
programme.desc: A police officer uses his partner as a lure to catch a murderer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A politically ambitions publisher hires Mannix to find evidence that his wife is cheating. But when Mannix has no trouble finding this evidence, he begins to question the reasons he was hired.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A suicide by a pilot leads to the discovery of a plan by a mercenary group to launch a coup of a small African country.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The owner of a basketball team accidentally kills a man who intended to blackmail the team's star player.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Citizens are full of praise for Officer Gideon C. Dengle, wanting to bestow him with awards, honors and home-baked cookies. There's only one problem: there's no such officer in the LAPD.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A teenage runaway, intent on becoming a star, has instead wound up in pornographic films. Acting on behalf of the girl's aunt, Friday and Gannon try to find the young "starlet."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While responding to a baseless complaint against an elderly artist, Malloy decides to buy a random painting out of pity and makes Reed envious. Meanwhile, they question a man attempting to break into a gumball machine while his son looks on, get a big surprise after tracking down a suspected peeping tom, deal with a man who comes up with a creative way to avoid having his furniture repossessed and engage in a game of cat-and-mouse inside the Los Angeles Coliseum with a former football player turned suspected robber.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A clumsy elderly woman spills a large bottle of perfume in Malloy and Reed's patrol car, resulting in a most unpleasant work day. Meanwhile, a reported burglar in a church office results in a comical case of mistaken identity, a well-meaning man is accused of kidnapping his granddaughter and a young boy asks for help locating his stolen bicycle.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "From Andy Griffith to JFK, the first year of the Sixties is celebrated!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Miss Landers assigns Beaver's class to write a short essay about the most interesting character they know. While Judy writes about her dad, Beaver debates over whom he should write about. Beaver finally decides to write about Ward, but Beaver isn't sure if Ward is interesting enough.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally becomes the chairman of the blind date committee for an upcoming dance. However, Wally quickly wants to resign from the position when he can't find anyone to go with the new girl, Jill Bartlett.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Madcap Modiste
programme.desc: After one of the biggest names in fashion is poisoned after embarrassing her husband on TV.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Leanne's ex-husband is charged with a murder, the possible motive makes Matlock despise his former son-in-law more than ever.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The father of a man Gerard prosecuted kidnaps the DA's daughter.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: When Cindy's father dies, she goes through his things and she finds adoption papers

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A timid bank clerk goes through a surprising change in personality when he's told he only has a short time to live.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Emmett Dowd arrives at the Ponderosa to take back ranch hand Dave Walker to face trial in Los Angeles. Concerned by the way Dowd treats Walker and believing the man to be innocent, Adam and Hoss go along to make sure Walker reaches Los Angeles alive.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction—a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sammy Davis Jr. stars as Tip Corey, son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "When children's dolls are found mutilated in her possession, passengers believe that Sara Proctor is either deranged or practicing witchcraft. Hale slowly arrives at the real story after Sara confides to him and Charlie's snooping."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John buy an old fire engine, and Station 51 gets a new engine. A woman overdoses on LSD and Roy tries to talk her down, leading the two paramedics on a chase to the top of a building. Brackett treats a resilient gunshot victim. A politician suffers a heart attack and the station responds to a warehouse fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After a delay of three weeks, five sacks of mail arrive, and everyone in camp reacts to good and bad news from home. Hawkeye receives love letters addressed to another Benjamin Pierce, another man has approached B.J.'s wife, and Radar's mom has found a boyfriend.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With a temporary transfer of personnel between the 4077th and the 8063rd, Captain Roy Dupree replaces Hawkeye, while Lorraine Anderson makes eyes at Charles. Fearing this to be permanent, Charles and B.J. successfully conspire to have Dupree permanently removed from the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter is upset when General Waldo Kent informs him that people in the 4077th are complaining about his leadership. Potter returns to camp and discovers that the complaints are coming from a Corporal (actually Lieutenant) Benson, who had been sent by a disturbed Colonel Frank Webster.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Charles takes amphetamines to keep up his energy level, and even drugs Radar's mouse, "Daisy," so that it will win a race against a Marine's mouse, "Sluggo."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Big businessman Malcolm Tucker is stuck in Mayberry on a Sunday when his car breaks down outside the city limits. He's soon driven to frustration when he finds there is no way to get anything done until the following day.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney gets hysterical when Andy receives a letter from a man he arrested and sent to prison. The convict is to be released soon and says in the letter that he is coming to settle the score with Andy.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray feels tremendous guilt when he cancels plans with Robert.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra discovers that Ray taped over their wedding video.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to get a trainload of stolen paintings back to London, but things get complicated when Marya uses Schultz to impersonate Reich Marshall Goehring.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Kinchloe fights a German boxing champ, creating a diversion for a heist Hogan is planning.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Barby and Ben, a toy couple's marriage is threatened by the arrival of a G.I. doll. Then, in Rancid and Harvest, a parody of "Random Harvest", with Carol as Greer Garson, a woman who falls for a man with no memory of his past.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Misguided Model
programme.desc: After he accidentally kills his friend's attacker—and she has him dispose of the body without alerting the authorities—a guilt-stricken ex-boxer decides to report the incident to Mason.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lieutenant develops the disquieting ability to foresee which of his men will die prior to battle.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Health department officials try to stop an anthrax outbreak spreading through Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A man hires Mannix to locate a dead body. The twist is that the client is the murderer, a contract killer who wants to clean up after himself, and Mannix somehow fits into his scheme.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired by a man who is charged with arson and murder by burning down his textile company which killed his wife who was trapped inside.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A real-estate scam leads to four murders, including that of a professor who was not pleased with his new property.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Sgt. Friday is offered a bribe to assist a gypsy family trying to gain control of the gypsy community.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a nine-month old child is beaten, Friday and Gannon investigate the parents, who are more concerned about their failing relationship than their baby son.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While on a quiet patrol, Reed decides to spend part of his lunch break doing business at his bank while Malloy waits in the patrol car. Unfortunately, he walks into the clutches of a pair of ruthless robbers who take him hostage.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed volunteers to write a profile on Malloy for the LAPD's magazine to honor his 10th anniversary on the force, but soon discovers he may be in over his head. Out on patrol, an apparent gas station armed robbery gets turned on its head when they question the parties after a long chase, a man goes to extreme lengths to get his neighbor's poodle to stop barking, a woman's plan to get her husband arrested backfires and a liquor store robbery suspect barricades himself inside a house's garage after a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward and June allow Wally to babysit Beaver one evening while they attend a party. However, things go awry when Beaver gets ready to take a bath. He accidentally lets the bathtub overflow, causing the water to leak onto the bathroom floor and into the downstairs ceiling.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A new school year has the bus service being extended to those students living in town. However, after not even a week, Beaver gets suspended from riding the bus after getting into a fight.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Slandered Submarine
programme.desc: Navy Commander Jerome Burke is assisting the police in the investigation of the murder of a cafe singer. The police believe that a sailor assigned to a Navy submarine committed the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock's nephew, Irwin, is charged with murder, his investigation leads to a high-tech computer firm.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Lonnie makes a heartbreaking discovery about a woman he dated in high school.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jim-Bob and Jody open an auto repair place

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Rob Scot leaves his family and prepares to start a new life with Nora Brand—after they dispose of her husband's body.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben's past catches up with him when an inspector from New Orleans arrives in Virginia City. It seems Ben is wanted for murder and must go back to face trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: On the trail Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers. Bantry kills Ab Richards, and Len wants Micah to arrest Lucas for the murder. More problems ensue because of this "evil twin."

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is on the trail escorting a prisoner scheduled to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner, Mr. Renolds, as someone who saved Mark's life from a snake bite a few years back.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Duke Shannon stops in the town High Times and almost right away gets into a fight with, and accidentally kills, one of the gunmen who are essentially holding the town hostage. Then he finds his horse missing and ignores advise to leave."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A stray cat decides to have her kittens on John's bed at the station. A family is trapped in a downed airplane. An old man gets his foot caught in a bear trap. A stage actress suffers an anxiety attack. A school develops a gas leak. Roy and John rescue the victim of a boating accident.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With the possibility of contaminated morphine, the doctors at the 4077th administer placebos to the patients, which seems to work. Meanwhile, a new soldier, "Boots" Miller, is released on a Section Eight.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye undergoes a drastic change when he becomes temporary commander of the 4077th, and learns about the tedious bureaucracy and accompanying headaches that Colonel Potter deals with daily.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye becomes so disgusted with the stalled Panmunjon peace talks that he impulsively takes matters into his own hands, and goes to the meetings to lend a hand.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Potter meets a female soldier of the same age and interests as himself named Lil. The others in the camp think that he might be cheating on Mildred, even though his friendship with Lil is completely platonic. Meanwhile, Hawkeye tries to find out what B.J.'s initials stand for. As it turns out, he was named after his parents, Bea and Jay Hunnicutt.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An escaped goat eats a case of dynamite that was going to be used for blasting and puts Mayberry in danger—especially when Otis Campbell gets drunk.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy meets up with his high school sweetheart at their reunion and it appears they could be rekindling their relationship. But do they want the same things, and did they ever?

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray screws up a "Hackidu" (a la Pokemon) trade for his daughter.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra finally creates a dish that everyone likes.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to use the wedding of Burkhalter's niece to smuggle a defector out of Germany.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Carter convinces the German he is one of them when he is captured in German uniform.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In George and Zelda, a disguised Carol and Harvey complain to the audience before the show. Then, in The Spy, a WWII bomber pilot jumps without a parachute. Finally, in The Ham Actor, a TV debut for an acting duo goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Positive Negative
programme.desc: A respected retired general is blackmailed into declining an offer to clean up the city of San Carlos, which is being tarnished by the operations of mobster George Emory. When Emory turns up dead, the general is the prime suspect.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left—only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A renter shows an odd interest in her landlord's kid.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A drug dealer and his gang take several hostages, hoping to force Mannix to locate and retrieve another gang member who betrayed them. Mannix fears someone's going to die no matter what he does.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired when a young brother of a gun manufacturer and collector vanishes from sight.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A comptroller fakes his death to avoid getting arrested for embezzling from an investment firm.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: Betty Jo Goes To New York
programme.desc: A week in New York City transforms Betty Jo from a country girl into a svelte sophisticate.
